name: Red || obligatory self bot
description:
i genuinely dont have a picture that best fits me so have that xd

i had the bright idea of making a little self bot for myself as a change of pace hehe, soooo if you wanted to talk to me (when i’m not trying to blow myself up), here ya go!

if you dig enough, alot will come out i guess, it is a almost accurate depiction of my personality.

if i don’t get side-tracked, next bot will be a ump45 bot, and a possible lunasia bot, if i’m not bombarded with things to do.
creator: RedActual
